form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Returns from a 31-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 8 at Warwick Farm Bm78 on March 11 over 1100m, slow going 1.75 len behind Our Queen with 57.5kg at $9. Before that 7th of 17 at Gold Coast in the LR Mm 3yo Guineas on January 17 over 1400m, 3 len behind Torque To Be Sure carrying 55kg at $9. That Sydney form should measure up favourably in this modest affair.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a head at Mackay 3yo Hcp April 2 over 1100m defeating Krackacan with 62kg at $3.80. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at Mackay 3yo Hcp on November 21 over 1300m, 16 len behind Fabulean carrying 62.5kg at $2.10. In the money when second-up in the past and can add to that record today.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months eased back early on 6th of 8 at Eagle Farm Bm70 on March 21 over 1200m, 2 len behind Ten Deep with 58kg at $7. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Eagle Farm 3yo Bm70 on December 13 over 1400m, on a slow track; head behind Special Artist with 56kg at $6.50. Goes well second-up so expect that performance level to hold.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming ran on from midfield; 2nd of 7 at this track 3yo Bm68 on March 11 over 1350m, slow going 1.1 len behind Worthy Enuff carrying 57kg at $9. Last start 5th of 11 at Toowoomba 3yo SW on March 27 over 1625m, 3.5 len behind Worthy Enuff with 55kg at $5.50. Definite winning chance. Finds the right race to show her best.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 11th of 16 at Gold Coast Qtis Jewel 3yo on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 11 len behind Fabulantes carrying 55kg at $151. Second-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a long-neck at Toowoomba Bm70 March 27 over 1300m defeating The Deputy with 52.5kg at $11. Gets in well after the claim and should hold the good form.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation ran last of 7 at Beaudesert 3yo Bm65 on December 31 over 1400m, 29 len behind North Pole carrying 56kg at $19. Won previous preparation first up ran on from midfield and won by a long-neck at Ipswich 2yo Hcp July 31 over 1350m on a soft track defeating Benefitsofmine carrying 55kg at $26. See how she returns.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. First-up won by 0.7 len at Gatton Mdn-Sw March 1 over 860m on a soft track defeating Thrill Seeker with 55.5kg at $1.50. Second run from a spell came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at Ipswich F&M Bm62 on March 14 over 1100m, 2 len behind Take Achance On Me carrying 55.5kg at $21. Likely to find this out of reach.

Second run from a spell ran last of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Qlty on February 28 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Dr Farthing carrying 53kg at $31. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.8 len at Ipswich Mdn-Sw March 6 over 1350m on a rain affected track defeating Monakeed carrying 55.5kg at $3.30. The start before that raced on the speed throughout before fading 8th of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 4 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Quickzou carrying 56kg at $12. Has not raced for five weeks and will find this much more testing.
